description: The result returned after successfully ingesting a custom event.
name: EventIngestResult

reportCount.description: The number of event reports created. This may be greater than 1 if the entitySelector matched multiple entities.

eventIngestResults.description: Details of each individual event ingestion result.

items.description: The result of ingesting an event for a single entity.

eventId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the created event.

status.description: The ingestion status for this entity. OK indicates success; other values indicate warnings or errors.
